daemons.name: watcher
daemons.description: Polls session files for new messages and enqueues them for classification. Core daemon - disabling stops all automatic memory updates.

daemons.name: classify
daemons.description: Assigns new messages to subjects using the subagent model. Runs after watcher enqueues work.

daemons.name: synthesize
daemons.description: Compacts archived subjects into a single synthesized memory using the meta model.

daemons.name: split
daemons.description: Detects large subjects that should be split into focused child subjects and proposes the split.

daemons.name: compact
daemons.description: Compacts active session message history when token count exceeds the configured ceiling.

daemons.name: escalate
daemons.description: Escalates unclassified messages to the meta model when the subagent cannot assign them.

daemons.name: reclass
daemons.description: After a subject split, re-attributes the parent's linked messages to the most appropriate child subject using the meta model.

daemons.name: attenuate
daemons.description: Decays confidence scores on semantic links over time so stale associations fade from recall.

daemons.name: reconcile
daemons.description: Detects agreement, contradiction, and supersession between memories sharing the same subject using vector similarity.
